# Altium FileHeader records (reviewable sibling -- NOT parsed at runtime).
# Index is the POST-HEADER position: the reader drops record 'H' (HEADER),
# so OwnerIndex N refers to the record printed with index N below.
 H : |HEADER=Protel for Windows - Schematic Capture Binary File Version 5.0| (auto-prepended)
 0 : RECORD=1 Location.X=900 Location.Y=1000 LibReference=DEVICE
 1 : RECORD=34 OwnerIndex=0 Text=U2
 2 : RECORD=2 OwnerIndex=0 Designator=1 Name=STAT Location.X=1010 Location.Y=1000 PinLength=10 PinConglomerate=2 Electrical=4 OwnerPartId=1
 3 : RECORD=1 Location.X=2100 Location.Y=1000 LibReference=DEVICE
 4 : RECORD=34 OwnerIndex=3 Text=R7
 5 : RECORD=2 OwnerIndex=3 Designator=1 Name=A Location.X=2010 Location.Y=1000 PinLength=10 PinConglomerate=2 Electrical=4 OwnerPartId=1
 6 : RECORD=27 LocationCount=2 X1=1000 Y1=1000 X2=2000 Y2=1000
 7 : RECORD=25 Location.X=1500 Location.Y=1000 Text=STAT
 8 : RECORD=1 Location.X=900 Location.Y=2000 LibReference=DEVICE
 9 : RECORD=34 OwnerIndex=8 Text=U3
10 : RECORD=2 OwnerIndex=8 Designator=2 Name=LED Location.X=1010 Location.Y=2000 PinLength=10 PinConglomerate=2 Electrical=4 OwnerPartId=1
11 : RECORD=1 Location.X=2100 Location.Y=2000 LibReference=DEVICE
12 : RECORD=34 OwnerIndex=11 Text=R12
13 : RECORD=2 OwnerIndex=11 Designator=1 Name=B Location.X=2010 Location.Y=2000 PinLength=10 PinConglomerate=2 Electrical=4 OwnerPartId=1
14 : RECORD=27 LocationCount=2 X1=1000 Y1=2000 X2=2000 Y2=2000
15 : RECORD=25 Location.X=1500 Location.Y=2000 Text=STAT
